acceptance.assertion: Job records include job_id, owner, scope, started_at, expected receipt, final status and terminalization evidence.
notify_on_done metadata can be represented without sending notifications by default.
Failed or missing finalization remains visible and is not hidden by notification success.
Focused tests cover job identity, terminal status, no-default-notify and failed finalization visibility.

goal: Define and implement the first durable job identity fields needed for optional notify_on_done behavior without relying on polling or hiding finalization failures.

metadata.non_goal: Does not enable background notification delivery by default.

validated_acceptance.failure-visible: _job_final_status and _job_terminalization_evidence preserve launch_failed, failed and missing_finalization_evidence. Notification evidence records final_status_preserved and cannot mask failed finalization.
validated_acceptance.job-identity: src/grabowski_operator.py defines _job_identity, _job_expected_receipt and _project_job_metadata. grabowski_job_start/status/logs expose job_id, owner, scope, started_at, expected_receipt, final_status and terminalization_evidence; tests/test_operator_contract.py covers these fields.
validated_acceptance.notify-metadata: _normalize_notify_on_done and _job_notification_evidence force delivery_mode=metadata_only and delivery_enabled=false; tests cover no-default-notify and strict bounded metadata.
validated_acceptance.tests: Focused tests passed: python3 -m pytest tests/test_operator_contract.py -q; python3 -m pytest tests/test_self_deploy.py -q; python3 -m pytest tests/test_repository_contract.py -q.

validation.focused_tests: tests/test_operator_contract.py: 35 passed, 8 subtests passed; tests/test_self_deploy.py: 7 passed; tests/test_repository_contract.py: 17 passed, 8 subtests passed.
validation.grabowski_runtime: grabowski_status reports deployed runtime repo_head 7b9b6ccd65ddaeeafcd49f81286d93ea590885bb with provenance_valid=true, runtime_binding_valid=true and environment_compatibility_valid=true.
non_claims: No new background notification channel was created.
This closes an already-satisfied task rather than adding new code.

metadata.verification_note: Live Grabowski main and deployed runtime already satisfy T005. Durable job records include identity, owner, scope, expected receipt, final status, terminalization evidence, notify_on_done metadata-only semantics and failed-finalization visibility. This closeout records that evidence without adding redundant Grabowski code.

title: Add durable job notify design slice
